<div data-cms-block="marketplace-core/gallery" data-attrs="eyJpbWFnZXMiOlt7InVybCI6IjAzLXBvcnRmb2xpby5qcGciLCJhbHQiOiJQb3J0Zm9saW8ifV19"></div>

## Description

Editorial canvas for showcasing work without ornament. Portfolio leans into typographic contrast and full-bleed imagery instead of UI chrome — sharp corners, zero shadows, single accent color (rose) reserved for active state only.

Drop your highest-resolution images into the media library, pick a project's hero, and let the theme handle responsive aspect ratios for every viewport. A built-in masonry-style project grid auto-arranges posts on the home page.
